case_title: JOHN CIKES et al VS. MARIANNA REIS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CIKES, JOHN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CIKES, JOHN CIKES, MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REIS, MARIANNA AKA MARIANNA VON ALBRECHT-REIS REIS, NICHOLAS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1609 BALBOA STREET, APT. 1, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94121 $1,961.20 RENT, $324.00 COSTS, $843.26 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,128.46, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
